requirements.full_sentence: FEMA 22/2000-RB dated May 3, 2000, on Foreign Exchange Management (establishment in India of Branch or office or other place of business) Regulation was repealed and replaced by Notification No.
requirements.object: Exchange Management (establishment in India of Branch or office or other place of business) Regulation was repealed and replaced b

requirements.full_sentence:
It may be noted that, whenever necessary, Reserve Bank shall issue directions to
Authorised Persons through A.P.
requirements.object: Persons through A

requirements.full_sentence:
The Master Direction issued
herewith shall be amended suitably simultaneously.

Applications from foreign companies (a body corporate incorporated outside
India, including a firm or other association of individuals) for establishing
BO/ LO/ PO in India shall be considered by the AD Category-I bank as per
the guidelines given by Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
requirements.object: AD Category-I bank as per the guidelines given by Reserve Bank of India (RBI)

requirements.full_sentence:
An application from a person resident outside India for opening of a
BO/LO/PO in India shall require prior approval of Reserve Bank of India and
shall be forwarded by the AD Category-I bank to the General Manager,
Reserve Bank of India, Central Office Cell, Foreign Exchange Department,
6, Sansad Marg, New Delhi - 110 001 who shall process the applications in
consultation with the Government of India, in the following cases:
a.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India and shall be forwarded by the AD Category-I bank to the General Manager, Reserve Bank of India, Centra

requirements.full_sentence:
However, prior approval of Reserve Bank of India shall not be required in
cases where Government approval or license/permission by the
concerned Ministry/Regulator has already been granted.
requirements.object: where Government approval or license/permission by the concerned Ministry/Regulator has already been granted

requirements.full_sentence: In the case of proposal for opening a PO relating to defence sector, no separate reference or approval of Government of India shall be required if the said non-resident applicant has been awarded a contract by/ entered into an agreement with Ministry of Defence or Service Headquarters or Defence Public Sector Undertakings.
requirements.object: said non-resident applicant has been awarded a contract by/ entered into an agreement with Ministry of Defence or Service Headquart

requirements.full_sentence:
No separate approval is required from Reserve Bank of India for such cases only."
case of proposal for opening a PO relating to defence sector, no
separate reference or approval of Government of India shall be required
if the said non-resident applicant has been awarded a contract by/
entered into an agreement with Ministry of Defence or Service
Headquarters or Defence Public Sector Undertakings.
requirements.object: said non-resident applicant has been awarded a contract by/ entered into an agreement with Ministry of Defence or Service Headquart

requirements.full_sentence:
However, if such entity is engaged, partly or wholly, in any of the
activities covered under Foreign Contribution (Regulation) Act, 2010
(FCRA), they shall obtain a certificate of registration under the said Act
and shall not seek permission under FEMA 22(R)3.

The non-resident entity applying for a BO/LO in India should have a
financially sound track record viz:
a.
requirements.object: track record viz: a

requirements.full_sentence:
An applicant that is not financially sound and is a subsidiary of another
company may submit a Letter of Comfort (LOC) (Annex A) from its parent/
group company, subject to the condition that the parent/ group company
satisfies the prescribed criteria for net worth and profit.
requirements.object: Comfort (LOC) (Annex A) from its parent/ group company

requirements.full_sentence:
The application for establishing BO / LO/ PO in India may be submitted by
the non-resident entity in Form FNC (Annex B) to a designated AD Category
- I bank (i.e.
requirements.object: non-resident entity in Form FNC (Annex B) to a designated AD Category - I bank (i

requirements.full_sentence:
The
AD Category-I bank shall after exercising due diligence in respect of the
applicant's background, and satisfying itself as regards adherence to the
eligibility criteria for establishing BO/LO/PO, antecedents of the promoter,
nature and location of activity of the applicant, sources of funds, etc., and
compliance with the extant KYC norms grant approval to the foreign entity
for establishing BO/LO/PO in India.
requirements.object: in respect of the applicant's background, and satisfying itself as regards adherence to the eligibility criteria for es

requirements.full_sentence:
The AD Category-I banks may frame
appropriate policy for dealing with these applications in conformity with the
FEMA Regulations and Directions.
requirements.object: dealing with these applications in conformity with the FEMA Regulations and Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
However, before issuing the approval letter to the applicant, the AD
Category-I bank shall forward a copy of the Form FNC along with the details
of the approval proposed to be granted by it to the General Manager,
Reserve Bank of India, CO Cell, New Delhi, for allotment of Unique
Identification Number (UIN) to each BO/LO.
requirements.object: the Form FNC along with the details of the approval proposed to be granted by it to the General Manager, Reserve Bank of India, CO C

requirements.full_sentence:
After receipt of the UIN from
the Reserve Bank, the AD Category-I bank shall issue the approval letter to
the non-resident entity for establishing BO/LO in India.
requirements.object: to the non-resident entity for establishing BO/LO in India

requirements.full_sentence:
Also, the project must have secured the
necessary regulatory clearances;
requirements.object: regulatory clearances

requirements.full_sentence:
An applicant that has received a permission for setting up of a BO/LO/PO
shall inform the designated AD Category I bank as to the date on which the
BO/LO/PO has been set up.
requirements.object: Category I bank as to the date on which the BO/LO/PO has been set up

requirements.full_sentence:
The AD Category I bank in turn shall inform
Reserve Bank accordingly.

In case an approval granted by the AD bank has
either been surrendered by the applicant or has expired without any
BO/LO/PO being set up, the AD Category I bank shall inform RBI
accordingly.

conditions:
in case the BO/LO/PO for which approval has been granted is
not opened within six months from the date of the approval letter
requirements.full_sentence:
The approval granted by the AD Category I bank should include a proviso to
the effect that in case the BO/LO/PO for which approval has been granted is
not opened within six months from the date of the approval letter, the
approval shall lapse.

In cases where the non-resident entity is not able to
open the office within the stipulated time frame due to reasons beyond its
control, the AD Category-I bank may consider granting extension of time for
a further period of six months for setting up the office.
requirements.object: time for a further period of six months for setting up the office

requirements.full_sentence:
Any further extension
of time shall require the prior approval of Reserve Bank of India in this
regard.
requirements.object: of Reserve Bank of India in this regard

requirements.full_sentence:
In the event of winding-up of business and for remittance of winding-up
proceeds, the branch shall approach an AD Category - I bank with the
documents as mentioned in para 10 under "Closure of Liaison / Branch
Office".
requirements.object: - I bank with the documents as mentioned in para 10 under "Closure of Liaison / Branch Office"

requirements.full_sentence:
An LO may approach the designated AD Category I Bank in India to open
an account to receive remittances from its Head Office outside India.
requirements.object: Category I Bank in India to open an account to receive remittances from its Head Office outside India

requirements.full_sentence:
It may
be noted that an LO shall not maintain more than one bank account at any
given time without the prior permission of Reserve Bank of India.
requirements.object: bank account at any given time without the prior permission of Reserve Bank of India

requirements.full_sentence:
The
permitted Credits and Debits to the account shall be:
a.

A BO may approach any AD Category-I Bank in India to open an account
for its operations in India.
requirements.object: Bank in India to open an account for its operations in India

requirements.full_sentence:
Credits to the account should represent the funds
received from Head Office through normal banking channels for meeting the
expenses of the office and any legitimate receivables arising in the process
of its business operations.
requirements.object: from Head Office through normal banking channels for meeting the expenses of the office and any legitimate receivables ar

requirements.full_sentence:
Debits to this account shall be for the expenses
incurred by the BO and towards remittance of profit/winding up proceeds.
requirements.object: incurred by the BO and towards remittance of profit/winding up proceeds

requirements.full_sentence:
Any foreign entity except an entity from Pakistan who has been awarded a
contract for a project by the Government authority/Public Sector
Undertakings or are permitted by the AD to operate in India may open a
bank account without any prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: without any prior approval of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
An entity from
Pakistan shall need prior approval of Reserve Bank of India to open a bank
account for its project office in India.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India to open a bank account for its project office in India

requirements.full_sentence:
The permissible debits to the account shall be payment of project
related expenditure and credits shall be foreign currency receipts
from the Project Sanctioning Authority and remittances from
parent/group company abroad or bilateral / multilateral international
financing agency.
requirements.object: related expenditure and credits shall be foreign currency receipts from the Project Sanctioning Authority and remittances from p

requirements.full_sentence:
The responsibility of ensuring that only the approved debits and
credits are allowed in the foreign currency account shall rest solely
with the AD Category-I bank.
requirements.object: AD Category-I bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the accounts shall be subject
to 100 per cent scrutiny by the Concurrent Auditor of the respective
AD Category-I bank.
requirements.object: per cent scrutiny by the Concurrent Auditor of the respective AD Category-I bank

requirements.full_sentence:
The designated AD Category - I bank shall scrutinize the AACs and ensure
that the activities undertaken by the BO/LO are being carried out in
accordance with the terms and conditions of the approval given.
requirements.object: ensure that the activities undertaken by the BO/LO are being carried out in accordance with the terms and conditions of the ap

requirements.full_sentence:
In the event
of any adverse findings reported by the auditor or noticed by the designated
AD Category -I bank, the same should immediately be reported to the
General Manager, Reserve Bank of India, CO Cell, New Delhi, along with
the copy of the AAC and their comments thereon.
requirements.object: the General Manager, Reserve Bank of India, CO Cell, New Delhi, along with the copy of the AAC and their comments thereon

requirements.full_sentence:
Requests for extension of time for LOs may be submitted before the
expiry of the validity of the approval, to the AD Category-I bank
concerned under whose jurisdiction the LO/nodal office is located.
requirements.object: expiry of the validity of the approval, to the AD Category-I bank concerned under whose jurisdiction the LO/nodal office is lo

requirements.full_sentence:
The
designated AD Category - I bank may extend the validity period of LO/s
for a period of 3 years from the date of expiry of the original approval /
extension granted if the applicant has complied with the following
conditions and the application is otherwise in order:
a.
requirements.object: of LO/s for a period of 3 years from the date of expiry of the original approval / extension granted if the applicant has c

requirements.full_sentence:
The LO should have submitted the Annual Activity Certificates
for the previous years and
b.
requirements.object: Activity Certificates for the previous years and b

requirements.full_sentence:
Reserve Bank
shall update the information on its website immediately.
requirements.object: its website immediately

requirements.full_sentence:
Upon expiry of the validity
period, the offices shall have to either close down or be converted into a
Joint Venture / Wholly Owned Subsidiary in conformity with the extant
Foreign Direct Investment policy.
requirements.object: down or be converted into a Joint Venture / Wholly Owned Subsidiary in conformity with the extant Foreign Direct Investment polic

requirements.full_sentence:
Registration with police authorities
Applicants from Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Afghanistan, Iran, China, Hong Kong,
Macau or Pakistan desirous of opening BO/LO/PO in India shall have to register
with the state police authorities.
requirements.object: the state police authorities

requirements.full_sentence:
Copy of approval letter for 'persons' from these
countries shall be marked by the AD Category-I bank to the Ministry of Home
Affairs, Internal Security Division-I, Government of India, New Delhi for necessary
action and record.
requirements.object: AD Category-I bank to the Ministry of Home Affairs, Internal Security Division-I, Government of India, New Delhi for necessary action

requirements.full_sentence:
Requests for establishing additional BOs / LOs may be submitted to the AD
Category-I bank in a fresh FNC form.
requirements.object: AD Category-I bank in a fresh FNC form

requirements.full_sentence:
East, West, North and South), the applicant has to justify the need for
additional office/s and it shall require prior approval of RBI.
requirements.object: RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
The applicant may identify one of its offices in India as the Nodal Office,
which will coordinate the activities of all of its offices in India.
requirements.object: offices in India as the Nodal Office, which will coordinate the activities of all of its offices in India

requirements.full_sentence:
However, no
permission is required if the LO/BO is shifted to another place in the
same city subject to the condition that the new address is intimated to
the designated AD Category-I bank.
requirements.object: shifted to another place in the same city subject to the condition that the new address is intimated to the designated AD Category-I b

requirements.full_sentence:
Changes in the postal address may
be intimated to the CO Cell, New Delhi by the AD Category-I bank at the
earliest.
requirements.object: CO Cell, New Delhi by the AD Category-I bank at the earliest

requirements.full_sentence:
Requests for undertaking activities in addition to what has been permitted
initially (Annex C) by Reserve Bank of India/ AD Category-I bank may be
submitted by the applicant to the Reserve Bank through the designated AD
Category -I bank justifying the need.
requirements.object: applicant to the Reserve Bank through the designated AD Category -I bank justifying the need

requirements.full_sentence:
Extension of fund and non-fund based facilities
AD Category-I bank, may, based on their business prudence, Board approved
policy and compliance to extant rules/regulations stipulated by DBR, RBI extend
fund/non-fund based facilities to BOs/POs only.
requirements.object: business prudence, Board approved policy and compliance to extant rules/regulations stipulated by DBR, RBI extend fund/non-fund based

requirements.full_sentence:
Requests for closure of the BO / LO/ PO and allowing the remittance of
winding up proceeds of BO / LO/ PO may be submitted to the designated
AD Category - I bank by the BO/ LO/ PO or their nodal office, as the case
may be.
requirements.object: designated AD Category - I bank by the BO/ LO/ PO or their nodal office, as the case may be

requirements.full_sentence:
The application for winding up may be submitted along with the
following documents:
a.
requirements.object: the following documents: a

requirements.full_sentence:
Designated AD Category-I bank may allow remittance of winding up
proceeds in respect of offices of banks and insurance companies, after
obtaining copies of permission of closure from the sectoral regulators
along with the documents mentioned above.
requirements.object: up proceeds in respect of offices of banks and insurance companies, after obtaining copies of permission of closure from t

requirements.full_sentence:
Transfer of assets of BO/LO/PO
Proposals for transfer of assets may be considered by the AD Category-I bank
only from BOs/LOs/POs who are adhering to the operational guidelines such as
submission of AACs (up to the current financial year) at regular annual intervals
with copies endorsed to DGIT (International Taxation);
requirements.object: AD Category-I bank only from BOs/LOs/POs who are adhering to the operational guidelines such as submission of AACs (up to the cur

requirements.full_sentence:
Statutory
Auditor should also confirm that the assets were not re-valued after their
initial acquisition.
requirements.object: assets were not re-valued after their initial acquisition

requirements.full_sentence:
The sale consideration should not be more than the
book value in each case.
requirements.object: book value in each case

requirements.full_sentence:
The assets should have been acquired by the BO/LO/PO from inward
remittances and no intangible assets such as good will, pre-operative
expenses should be included.
requirements.object: the BO/LO/PO from inward remittances and no intangible assets such as good will, pre-operative expenses should be included

requirements.full_sentence:
AD Category-I bank must ensure payment of all applicable taxes while
permitting transfer of assets.
requirements.object: applicable taxes while permitting transfer of assets

requirements.full_sentence:
to NGOs or other not-for-profit organisations may be
permitted by the AD category-I banks after satisfying itself about the
bonafides of the transaction.
requirements.object: AD category-I banks after satisfying itself about the bonafides of the transaction

requirements.full_sentence:
The BOs / LOs shall obtain Permanent Account Number (PAN) from the
Income Tax Authorities on setting up of their office in India and report the
same in the AACs.
requirements.object: (PAN) from the Income Tax Authorities on setting up of their office in India and report the same in the AACs

requirements.full_sentence:
Each BO/ LO/PO are required to transact through one designated AD
Category-I bank only who shall be responsible for the due diligence and
KYC norms of the BO/LO/PO.
requirements.object: due diligence and KYC norms of the BO/LO/PO

requirements.full_sentence:
BO /LO/PO, present in multiple locations,
are required to transact through their designated AD.
requirements.object: designated AD

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the AD
of the nodal office is required to comply with all the reporting norms.
requirements.object: the reporting norms

requirements.full_sentence:
Acquisition of property by BO/PO shall be governed by the guidelines
issued under Foreign Exchange Management (Acquisition and transfer
of immovable property outside India) Regulations.
requirements.object: guidelines issued under Foreign Exchange Management (Acquisition and transfer of immovable property outside India) Regulations

requirements.full_sentence:
However, such facility may
not be extended to shipping/airline companies.
requirements.object: companies

conditions:
In case a BO/LO has been established and continues to exist without
approval of the Reserve Bank
requirements.full_sentence:
In case a BO/LO has been established and continues to exist without
approval of the Reserve Bank, such BO/LO may approach their AD
Category-I bank to regularise their offices under FEMA 1999, even if
permission of Reserve Bank was not required as per the regulations
existing at the time of setting up of the office.
requirements.object: bank to regularise their offices under FEMA 1999, even if permission of Reserve Bank was not required as per the regulati

requirements.full_sentence:
Such cases may be
brought to the notice of Reserve Bank immediately for allotment of UIN.
requirements.object: notice of Reserve Bank immediately for allotment of UIN

requirements.full_sentence:
The foreign entities who may have established LO or BO with the
permission from the Government of India in the pre-FEMA period shall
also approach their AD Category-I bank with a copy of the said approval
for allotment of a UIN by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: Category-I bank with a copy of the said approval for allotment of a UIN by the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Change in the name of the existing LO/BO may be permitted by the AD
Category-I bank only if the non-resident entity changes its name without
change in ownership and if the application to this effect is received with
the Board resolution for change of name and documents/certificate from
ROC India showing change of name.
requirements.object: AD Category-I bank only if the non-resident entity changes its name without change in ownership and if the application to this eff

requirements.full_sentence:
The change in name of the BO/LO
should be reported to FED, CO Cell, New Delhi.
requirements.object: CO Cell, New Delhi

requirements.full_sentence:
Foreign entities
should note that the approvals are given by the Reserve Bank/AD
Category-I bank after detailed scrutiny as per laid down guidelines and
FDI policies and hence the approvals given to one foreign entity is not
transferrable to another foreign entity.
requirements.object: are given by the Reserve Bank/AD Category-I bank after detailed scrutiny as per laid down guidelines and FDI policies and henc

requirements.full_sentence:
However, AD Category-I bank should be intimated about the
same.
requirements.object: same

requirements.full_sentence:
Annex A
Format of the Letter of Comfort
The Authorised Signatory,
(Address of the Authorised Dealer Category-I bank)
Dear Sir,
Sub: Application for establishment of branch / liaison Office in India by our subsidiary / group company, M/s_________________________

You may kindly refer to the application made by our subsidiary / group company,
M/s_____________________________to your office for establishing branch / liaison
office in India.
requirements.object: application made by our subsidiary / group company, M/s_____________________________to your office for establishing branch / liais

requirements.full_sentence:
Any liability that may
arise due to the functioning of the branch/liaison office in India will be met by us (the
parent company/group company), in case of inability on part of the branch/ liaison
office to do so.
requirements.object: functioning of the branch/liaison office in India will be met by us (the parent company/group company), in case of inability on part

requirements.full_sentence:
Annex B
Form FNC
Application for establishment of branch office/liaison office/project office in India
[This application form shall be completed and submitted to the AD Category-I bank designated by the applicant along with the documents mentioned in item (viii) of the Declaration.]

Part I
No.
requirements.object: to the AD Category-I bank designated by the applicant along with the documents mentioned in item (viii) of the Declaration

requirements.full_sentence:
We will not undertake either partly or fully, any activity that is
covered under Foreign Contribution Regulation Act, 2010 (FCRA) and we
understand that any misrepresentation made or false information furnished by us in
this behalf would render the approval granted under the Foreign Exchange
Management (Establishment in India of a branch office or liaison office or a project
office or any other place of business) Regulations, 2016, automatically as void ab
initio and such approval by the Reserve Bank shall stand withdrawn without any
further notice.4
iii.
requirements.object: further notice

conditions: If we shift the office to another place within the city
requirements.full_sentence:
If we shift the office to another place within the city, we shall intimate the
designated AD Category - I bank.
requirements.object: Category - I bank

requirements.full_sentence:
We will abide by the terms and conditions that may be stipulated by the
Government of India / Reserve Bank of India/ designated AD Category - I bank,
from time to time.
requirements.object: Government of India / Reserve Bank of India/ designated AD Category - I bank, from time to time

conditions: If the original Certificate is in a language other than in English
requirements.full_sentence:
[If the original Certificate is in a language other than in English, the same
may be translated into English and notarized as above and cross
verified/attested by the Indian Embassy/ Consulate in the home country].
requirements.object: and notarized as above and cross verified/attested by the Indian Embassy/ Consulate in the home country]

conditions:
If the applicants' home country laws/regulations do not insist on auditing of
accounts
requirements.full_sentence:
[If the applicants' home country laws/regulations do not insist on auditing of
accounts, an Account Statement certified by a Certified Public Accountant
(CPA) or any Registered Accounts Practitioner by any name, clearly
showing the net worth may be submitted]
c.

Annex C
Permitted activities for a branch office in India of a person resident outside India
Normally, the branch office should be engaged in the activity in which the parent
company is engaged.
requirements.object: activity in which the parent company is engaged

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, they shall
bring to the notice of the Reserve Bank in case any such violation of the provisions of
the Advocates Act comes to their notice.5
5 Inserted vide AP (DIR Series) Circular No 07 dated November 23, 2020.
requirements.object: of the Reserve Bank in case any such violation of the provisions of the Advocates Act comes to their notice

requirements.full_sentence: FEMA 22(R)/2016-RB March 31, 2016 2 AP DIR Series Circular No.69 May 12, 2016 3 Notification No.
requirements.object: No
